failure_reason: Repaired the public canary failure exposed after PR #2670. Native kernel routing and config carrier were active, but graph_node_revisions.id used fixed route-level values such as rev-native-public-gate-create-idea, which collide under repeated production creates. production-routes.fk now emits revision ids as route-prefix:node-id:revision-number, and mutation_public_gate_harness.py proves repeated no-reset default and public-gate creates produce distinct revision ids.
